ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_number" TEXT /* Unique report number assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department managing the report */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES report_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's login name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reviewer, public) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_process" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was completed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report version being reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_process_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_process_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_process_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES report_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the attachment belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_topics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the metric */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the report */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the audit entry */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the report */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
